svg.text: PERSIAN (فارسی) / KURDISH (کوردی)
IRANIAN BRANCH · INDO-EUROPEAN · SISTER LANGUAGES ACROSS ZAGROS
PLATE 23A ALT · SCRIPT & SOUNDS
— PERSIAN: SCRIPT & WRITING —
Script: Perso-Arabic (Nastaliq calligraphic style) · right-to-left
32 letters: Arabic 28 + 4 Persian additions: پ (p) چ (ch) ژ (zh) گ (g)
Vowels: short vowels omitted in adult writing (inferred from context)
Three short vowels (a e o) are diacritics; three long vowels (a: i: u:) are letters
PERSIAN PHONOLOGY
Consonants: /p b t d k g/ · /f v s z ʃ ʒ x ɣ h/ · /m n/ · /r l/ · /j w/
6 vowels: /a ə i e o u/ in Modern Persian (length distinction reduced)
No tones · no grammatical gender · stress: final syllable in most words
PERSIAN EZAFE CONSTRUCTION (اضافه)
Ezafe: linking particle -e/-ye connects noun to modifier
ketab-e man = book-EZAFE me = "my book" (possessor follows noun)
ketab-e bozorg = book-EZAFE big = "big book" (adjective follows noun)
Ezafe chains: khane-ye bozorg-e man = house-E big-E me = "my big house"
PERSIAN SAMPLE WORDS
سلام (salam) = hello · ممنونم (mamnunam) = thank you
آب (ab) = water · پارسی (parsi/farsi) = Persian language
PERSIAN LOANWORDS IN WORLD LANGUAGES
English via French/Latin: azure (lazur) · chess (shah) · check (shah, same root)
Also: paradise (pardis) · bazaar (bazar) · caravan (karvan) · shawl (shal)
Persian was the lingua franca of Islamic high culture: Mughal, Ottoman, Safavid courts
SAMPLE LITERARY PERSIAN
بشنو این نی چون شکایت می‌کند = "Listen to this reed, how it complains" (Rumi)
KURDISH (کوردی) — IRANIAN SISTER · NORTHWESTERN BRANCH
— KURDISH: TWO SCRIPTS, TWO MAJOR DIALECTS —
Kurmanji (North Kurdish): ~15-20M speakers · Turkey, Syria, diaspora
Kurmanji script: LATIN alphabet (Turkey forced this in 1932; now a blessing)
Sorani (Central Kurdish): ~6-7M speakers · Iraqi Kurdistan, NW Iran
Sorani script: Arabic-based (similar to Persian script) · right-to-left
KURMANJI LATIN ORTHOGRAPHY
31 letters + digraphs: ch, gh, kh, rr, sh, wh, xh · special: ê î û
ê /e:/ · î /i:/ · û /u:/ — circumflex marks long vowels
KURDISH PHONOLOGY (KURMANJI)
Consonants: /p b t d k g q/ · /f v s z ʃ ʒ x ʁ h/ · /m n/ · /r ʁ/ · /l/
Uvular /q/ and /ʁ/ distinguish Kurdish from Persian
6 vowels: /a ɛ i o u ə/ — similar to Persian
SCRIPT COMPARISON
DIALECT
SCRIPT
DIRECTION
Kurmanji
Latin (Hawar alphabet)
Left-to-right
Sorani
Arabic/Persian-based
Right-to-left
Zazaki/Gorani
Latin or Arabic
Varies
KURDISH SAMPLE WORDS (KURMANJI)
Silav / Merheba = hello · av = water · spas = thank you
kurd = Kurd/strong one · Kurmanci = northern Kurdish language
